title: Slams
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Slam}} {{Organization |image= |name=Slams |type= |founder=[[Roper Slam]] |leader=*Roper Slam *[[Valadon]] |subgroup= |headquarters=[[Mamendin]], a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet |locations=[[Romin]], a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid-Rim]] planet |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Ferus Olin]] }} {{Quote|Question. What if we meet someone on Romin who's met the Slams before?"
"Not probable. The Slams operated in a different corner of the galaxy. Their reputation is big, but they didn't travel very far. It's a risk we'll have to take.|Jedi Masters Siri Tachi and Obi-Wan Kenobi|''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]''}} The '''Slams''', also known as the '''Slam gang''', were a gang of young thugs from [[Mamendin]], in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], starting out there with con jobs and ID thefts. They then roamed [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], mostly in the Core, pulling scams. They were the gang who notoriously heisted the entire treasury of [[Vuma/Legends|Vuma]]; the [[Crystalline vertex/Legends|crystalline vertex]] they stole nearly bankrupted the planet. [[Roper Slam]], a con man, and [[Valadon]], an ID theft expert, were the gang's founder-leaders. The only other gang members included [[Waldo (individual)|Waldo]], a security expert, and [[Ukiah]], a weapons and defense expert; they kept their numbers small to maintain loyalty. The Slams kept meticulous records and multiple ID docs for false identities. The gang was captured and imprisoned in the [[Greylands Security Complex]] on [[Tentator]] but managed to escape the poorly-maintained high-security prison. However, after attempting—and failing—to break into a [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] security vault, the Slams were recaptured in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]] and sent back to the prison. Their ship, an [[Ubrikkian star yacht]], was later confiscated and used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in their [[mission to Romin]] to track down [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. Very shortly after their re-committal to the Greylands prison, the Slams ''again ''escaped by bribing the prison director. For refuge they fled, of all places, to [[Romin]], where Slam, unwittingly, ran into [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] (who was impersonating Slam) at an extravagant reception for the world's wealthy hosted by the planet's tyrant-dictator [[Roy Teda]]. They chatted over [[quint-berry juice]]. The Slams next joined up with Teda and Zan Arbor in their escape from the conflict then erupting on Romin from an uprising of its oppressed [[Citizens' Resistance|citizens]] led by [[Joylin]]. The gang was furious that the Jedi had impersonated them. The Zan Arbor-led criminal elements fled in the Slam's re-secured yacht to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid-Rim]] planet of [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]], there to join their forces with arch-enemy of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], [[Granta Omega]]. The Jedi followed them, however, thanks to a tracking device planted by Kenobi's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], 17-year-old [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' Even so, Slam and Valadon were able to evade the Jedi and escape Falleen with Omega and Zan Arbor, traveling to the galactic capital planet of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to execute a major [[Attack on the Senate Building|attack]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. In that attempted [[Bank of the Core Plaza]] heist and [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] murder operation (in which [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was targeted), Slam and Valadon were captured again and returned to prison. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Criminal organizations]]
